name: YouTube
description: Provide token-optimized, structured YouTube data to enhance your LLM applications. Access efficien
longDescription: Token-optimized YouTube data MCP server. Access video details, search videos, get transcripts, channel statistics, trending videos, and comments. Designed for efficient LLM consumption with minimal token usage.
author: ai.smithery
examplePrompts: Get details for this YouTube video
Get the transcript of this video
Show me trending videos in the US
Get statistics for this YouTube channel
